name: V003_Sialyllactose_CRITICAL_TEST
description: Sialic acid validation - C2 anomeric carbon (ketose property)

SIA.note: Neu5Ac is a 9-carbon ketose, anomeric position differs from aldoses

validation_checklist: CRITICAL: Check that SIA C2 (not C1) is the anomeric carbon
CRITICAL: Check that SIA ring oxygen is O6
Check alpha configuration of SIA-GAL linkage (axial C2-O bond)
Check beta configuration of GAL-BGC linkage
Compare with SMILES input result - SMILES typically fails on C2 positioning
comparison_note: If SMILES format were used, AF3 would likely place the anomeric bond at C1 (incorrect for sialic acid). The BAP format forces correct C2 placement. This is a key demonstration of GlycoSMILES2BAP value.
